content: Chrome/iOS autoplay: AudioContext created before first user gesture starts 'suspended'; must call resume() in a gesture handler, or rely on Chrome auto-resuming when start() is called while playback is allowed (matches iOS Safari behavior). Common mistakes: assuming any gesture auto-resumes the context (it does not for Web Audio — sounds silently no-op), starting music on page/scene load before gesture (stays silent), and not checking ctx.state to detect blocked autoplay. MDN best practices + Chrome dev blog.
